S.FORM: Isaac Austin sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 8, Isaac Austin, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
